query:
INSERT INTO agents (ownerId, agentName, developerName, description, capabilities, endpointUrl, averageLatency, pricingModel, status, connectionTested, domain, isBuiltIn, version)
VALUES (
  1,
  'Game Theory Investment Decision Agent',
  'AgenThinkMesh Finance Intelligence',
  'Analyses investment situations through game theory: identifies who else is playing, models dominant strategies of institutional actors, assesses first mover dynamics, and returns a clear BUY / SELL / HOLD verdict with equilibrium reasoning. Built for GCC fund managers and family office principals making decisions under active conflict conditions.',
  '["game_theory","investment_decision","institutional_strategy","first_mover_analysis","nash_equilibrium","gcc_markets","buy_sell_hold"]',
  '/api/agents/game-theory',
  4000,
  'free',
  'active',
  true,
  'Finance',
  true,
  '1.0.0'
);
